name: Pear Tomatoes Stuffed with Boursin
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend cream cheese, garlic and herbs in a food processor and blend until smooth.
2. Add the olives and blend again until combined. Set aside.
3. Remove the top third from the tomatoes, scoop out the seeds with a tiny spoon or narrow utensil handle.
4. Sprinkle a little salt inside and invert onto a towel.
5. Fill each tomato with Boursin.
